    607.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Oh, erm, hello, High Harper! That is. Jaheira. Mum - argh - ma'am!Jaheira

    Flags and Tags

    checktype Tag | speaker 1 Player
    • Jaheira {8457eb5f-036c-4143-b6cf-447a9f555c7a} = True

    Text

    Oh, erm, hello, High Harper! That is. Jaheira. Mum - argh - ma'am!
    hf6edb1e1gd1a5g4497gb0f2geb09c5a93c63 | dcac160d-e69a-49a2-b3a1-145352e1910f | stub
    It's an honour to work with you, ma'am.
    h106a54edg626cg4a5agb982gd8388d6d6f53 | 034c974a-3aef-4750-a0a0-9293b4de0028 | stub
    Milady.
    h97e584ccgcb9cg4a65gb911g90e0742621e8 | d8884f7f-9b70-41ba-b239-3cba1d33fa5d | stub

    581.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Sorry - haven't fraternised with you much and not sure I want to start.!Avatar

    Flags and Tags

    checktype Tag | speaker 1 Player
    • Avatar {306b9b05-1057-4770-aa17-01af21acd650} = False

    Text

    Sorry - haven't fraternised with you much and not sure I want to start.

      570.Origin_Intro_Karlach: First step, save the city. Then, save myself. And last but not least: dinner with an old friend. What more could you ask for? [End]

      60.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Had a nice break in the Hells. Now that we're back, my engine's in overdrive again.

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 18816ea7-0047-3c63-fb90-51dcda483a09Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: h07c259dcgaf97g49dfg994cgb05b03850e0eText UUID: b54b833b-7dc3-46c6-bca8-1c0c0beb5e31Group ID: f6407e6b-0fe8-f0e3-8a8e-7976542626a3Group Index: 1
      • •
        316.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Let's move. A trot will take my mind off being barbecued alive. [End]

        Metadata

      71.Player: Right - don't worry, we'll go after them.

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 1b747500-6ac1-fd8d-0b72-50c89af99e79Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h48bc719cgc76ag4014ga6edgdc95039049f1Text UUID: fbca10fa-6a86-43df-b9e5-e56231ff3848Show Once: True
      • •
        155.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Good news. Can't wait to see 'em finished. [End]

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 3e532e69-a8e8-23e8-2cd4-2466c838bd3aSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: h2a0b3c15g8b1dg4b2bg81cegd809ce1f79daText UUID: 9b84c7b3-38df-4cb7-938c-0a64b442e43aTimeline Phase Index: 286Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 3e532e69-a8e8-23e8-2cd4-2466c838bd3aTimeline Phase Duration: 4.31sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Material 1 Group ID: 09dc23f6-dd8b-4dd3-a037-634a54a453f7Timeline Material 1 Group File: Engine\Public\Engine\Timeline\MaterialGroups\09dc23f6-dd8b-4dd3-a037-634a54a453f7.lsfTimeline Material 1 Material Resource ID: f7f72db3-3734-835c-da31-7d6a3ef459bdTimeline Material 1 Material Resource Name: VFX_Cinematic_CHAR_SSS_Karlach_Fire_01Timeline Material 1 Material VFX File: Public\SharedDev\Assets\Materials\Effects\Cinematic\VFX_Cinematic_CHAR_SSS_Karlach_Fire_01.lsfTimeline Material 2 Group ID: e4960711-37ae-486b-ae02-494d31469305Timeline Material 2 Group File: Engine\Public\Engine\Timeline\MaterialGroups\e4960711-37ae-486b-ae02-494d31469305.lsfTimeline Material 2 Material Resource ID: 00caa442-cea1-d836-2ccf-828a69c68abfTimeline Material 2 Material Resource Name: VFX_Model_Unlit_Glow_Karlach_MetalParts_01Timeline Material 2 Material VFX File: Public\Shared\Assets\Materials\Effects\Model\VFX_Model_Unlit_Glow_Karlach_MetalParts_01.lsfTimeline Material 3 Group ID: 9a832561-3d40-462c-b5b3-e72de8dda8e5Timeline Material 3 Group File: Engine\Public\Engine\Timeline\MaterialGroups\9a832561-3d40-462c-b5b3-e72de8dda8e5.lsfTimeline Material 3 Material Resource ID: 567453b8-19e1-bb22-ee1f-491d55c9bedcTimeline Material 3 Material VFX File: (not found)Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [2147.54s-2151.85s] | @ 2147.54s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [2147.54s-2151.85s] | @ 2148.11s | speaker 0 | Confusion (1024) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [2147.54s-2151.85s] | @ 2149.82s | speaker 0 | Confusion (1024) | variation 2End Node: True
    • +
      608.Player: Wouldn't you rather just forget about them?

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: fb0f506f-2382-b7dc-ad15-26191784002eSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h5c14ebdag8d47g4674gbdcdg3abb3383ea18Text UUID: c77921f1-b135-4251-9ba5-4d8d1cdf7aa4Show Once: True
      • •
        49.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Not really. I'd rather send Zariel a message to leave me the fuck alone.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 157ba7d9-1e66-fb6d-9b59-bdb59bde68b9Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: h37decd7cg9dfeg4e19gb886g08e0b970bef5Text UUID: c5a2cca3-918e-49b2-b39b-24e31575153fTimeline Phase Index: 157Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 157ba7d9-1e66-fb6d-9b59-bdb59bde68b9Timeline Phase Duration: 6.32sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Timeline Material 1 Group ID: 9a832561-3d40-462c-b5b3-e72de8dda8e5Timeline Material 1 Group File: Engine\Public\Engine\Timeline\MaterialGroups\9a832561-3d40-462c-b5b3-e72de8dda8e5.lsfTimeline Material 1 Material Resource ID: 567453b8-19e1-bb22-ee1f-491d55c9bedcTimeline Material 1 Material VFX File: (not found)Timeline Material 2 Group ID: 09dc23f6-dd8b-4dd3-a037-634a54a453f7Timeline Material 2 Group File: Engine\Public\Engine\Timeline\MaterialGroups\09dc23f6-dd8b-4dd3-a037-634a54a453f7.lsfTimeline Material 2 Material Resource ID: f7f72db3-3734-835c-da31-7d6a3ef459bdTimeline Material 2 Material Resource Name: VFX_Cinematic_CHAR_SSS_Karlach_Fire_01Timeline Material 2 Material VFX File: Public\SharedDev\Assets\Materials\Effects\Cinematic\VFX_Cinematic_CHAR_SSS_Karlach_Fire_01.lsfTimeline Material 3 Group ID: e4960711-37ae-486b-ae02-494d31469305Timeline Material 3 Group File: Engine\Public\Engine\Timeline\MaterialGroups\e4960711-37ae-486b-ae02-494d31469305.lsfTimeline Material 3 Material Resource ID: 00caa442-cea1-d836-2ccf-828a69c68abfTimeline Material 3 Material Resource Name: VFX_Model_Unlit_Glow_Karlach_MetalParts_01Timeline Material 3 Material VFX File: Public\Shared\Assets\Materials\Effects\Model\VFX_Model_Unlit_Glow_Karlach_MetalParts_01.lsfTimeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [797.32s-802.5s] | @ 798.71s | speaker 0 | Confusion (1024) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [797.32s-802.5s] | @ 800.33s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [803.64s-809.48s] | @ 803.64s | speaker 0 | Confusion (1024) | variation 2
    • +
      536.Player: We have more important things to worry about. The tadpole in our heads, for instance.

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: dddaebf4-ae52-1f95-4ed4-6227fb642531Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h85ffe22dga572g48e6g898egefe8b3263c03Text UUID: dfcf955a-4fd9-46ec-a3d4-904d506e5461Show Once: True
      • •
        273.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Believe me, it won't take long. Let's go mop 'em up real quick and take it from there. Come on! It'll be fun. [End]

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 76f5cb99-ad6b-d063-1884-45db30f27c06Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: h7a02d877gd780g42feg8bd5g1303554efe84Text UUID:               59.Origin_Intro_Karlach: I'm a hungry lady. I don't think I have it in me to share. Not now, anyway.

      • +
        370.Origin_Intro_Karlach: I know I had designs on you. But I'm glad you found a little happiness with someone who could actually give it to you. Especially someone like Wyll.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 9ea91d94-2855-5173-c390-ad7a6b3cf39cSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: h24a7880fge036g4c8fg9f9fg14b9dd8a6782Text UUID: 5aea5d64-6425-44a7-a313-2336799d691fGroup ID: c81499da-4a7d-927b-5f70-9023129a8adbGroup Index: 1
        • +
          255.Player: Thanks, Karlach. It means a lot to me that you approve.!ORI_State_DatingKarlach

          Flags and Tags

          settype Object | speaker 1 Player
          • ORI_State_DatingKarlach {f24c3f3e-7287-4908-84bf-ba314921f5ee} = False

            117.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Wyll's got me wrapped around his little finger, to be honest. You treat him right, you hear?

            Metadata

            • +
              143.Origin_Intro_Karlach: And if this blessed union should result in long term bliss, Auntie Karlach will be here to take the bairns off your hands whenever you wish.

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 38338ca6-6e56-be0a-0a46-6c86eb124dd7Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: h61aa615cg2f5dg4bc6gabd1g2b0d5192db06Text UUID: 8db40abd-3de2-4c3b-b61c-1363c433bef0Group ID: 2d3bd886-bb22-5d02-5340-8ffd3fa7a4d9Group Index: 1
              • •
                147.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Wyll's a serious man. It's not that far-fetched. Anyway. Don't worry about me. Karlach can survive anything. Even you. [End]

                Metadata

                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 3a349d25-f8ca-98c9-00ba-5936c7a5a70cSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: hf8375987gef84g4b9cgb6cag5abfbc4e8a1cText UUID: d62c069c-adec-11ed-99d9-33ac06fd9ef1End Node: TrueGroup ID: 2d3bd886-bb22-5d02-5340-8ffd3fa7a4d9Group Index: 2
        • +
          520.Player: I do care for Wyll, but I care about you, too. Why do I have to choose between you?!ORI_State_DatingKarlach

          Flags and Tags

          settype Object | speaker 1 Player
          • ORI_State_DatingKarlach {f24c3f3e-7287-4908-84bf-ba314921f5ee} = False

          Metadata

          • +
            33.Origin_Intro_Karlach: 'Cause I'm starving, soldier. I'm not going to share you. Or... whoever comes after you, I suppose. I doubt Wyll would, either.

            Metadata

            • +
              327.Origin_Intro_Karlach: He's traditional, and I'm just a ravenous beast who wants all the attention for herself. Ain't sorry about it, either.

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 8d6faaa7-6a1a-eba6-4458-f34b104e1437Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: h14c5322fg5052g4545gbc20gf4244bc2257dText UUID: 2bbe4fe7-9df5-4e42-a86b-1da61af82f20Group ID: 0df5ff53-0fd0-6a15-858a-f628ea9f0bbeGroup Index: 1
              • •
                378.Origin_Intro_Karlach: But look, I wish you both the best. I promise not to make things too awkward. Only just awkward enough. [End]

                Metadata

      • +
        195.Origin_Intro_Karlach: I know I had... well. You know I liked you. Like you. But I want you to be with someone who can make you happy. If that's Gale, that's Gale.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 50e3bf5a-583f-c3df-f880-bd886ab528ccSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: h39f0bb7fgdf07g4198g8f63g412ec553a24dText UUID: d62c069f-adec-11ed-99d9-33ac06fd9ef1Group ID: ba5faa84-f675-4fd3-ecdf-b04c387e77beGroup Index: 1
        • +

            512.Origin_Intro_Karlach: My friendship. Wonderful.

              591.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Look, I'll be all right. Give me a night to lick my wounds and patch up my pride, and I'll be right back to crushing evil before sunrise.

              Metadata

                197.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Hope you don't regret throwing over all this fire for all that hot air. One'll get you through winter, the other'll recite you a lot of codices. But hey. To each their own. [End]

                Metadata

              209.Origin_Intro_Karlach: When Gale's on page one hundred thirty six of a supremely boring recitation, and you look over and there I am throwing a lasso around a giant centipede and riding it to Chult, I'll have my comeuppance. [End]

              Text

              When Gale's on page one hundred thirty six of a supremely boring recitation, and you look over and there I am throwing a lasso around a giant centipede and riding it to Chult, I'll have my comeuppance.

      398.Origin_Intro_Karlach: From what I can tell, Astarion really needs you. And you need him, too.

        312.Origin_Intro_Karlach: I know I had designs on you. But I'm glad you found a little happiness with someone who could actually give it to you.

              292.Origin_Intro_Karlach: As long as he treats you right, I can deal. One wrong move, though, and I'm dumping his pomade in the river.

              Metadata

              • See Node 191 (Origin_Intro_Karlach) Now get out of my sight. I have some stakes to sharpen.

                        201.Origin_Intro_Karlach: But poor Wyll. He's going to be heartbroken. Tsk. I don't know if he'll want me to be there for him, but... but, well, I don't know. This is shit.

                          24.Origin_Intro_Karlach: I'm glad you chose me. But I'm sorry it comes at the cost of Wyll's heartbreak. Let him down easy, all right? [End]

                          Metadata

                        490.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Tell Minthara right away. She needs to be taken down a peg - badly. In fact, she'll probably get off on it. [End]

    384.Origin_Intro_Karlach: I was just thinking. You know - for a while there I thought there was something between us. I know you felt it too.VISITEDREGION_INT_Main_A!ORI_State_PartneredWithKarlachORI_State_DatingKarlach!ORI_State_DatingKarlach

      408.Origin_Intro_Karlach: But it blew out, didn't it? Can't capture lightning in a bottle, I guess. No matter much you want to. No hard feelings, of course. That's life.

      Metadata

        185.Player: Maybe I... I've made a mistake. I should never have doubted what we have, Karlach.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 4c85c59d-3601-c115-a184-c8f368919caeSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h431ed9b6ge1dbg4821gbb7dg36819ceb70aeText UUID: a9733e2e-ab03-4573-8072-82c2f5b80680Show Once: True
        • +
          415.Origin_Intro_Karlach: I'm only going to say this once, so listen carefully: The people who care about you aren't playthings. You don't get to toss them aside and then pick them up again when you get bored.

          Text

          I'm only going to say this once, so listen carefully: The people who care about you aren't playthings. You don't get to toss them aside and then pick them up again when you get bored.
          h8634d918gbd91g44bbga054gc06696305b58 | 2f136710-98f2-43fc-8671-1eabb1deee2f | stub

            597.Origin_Intro_Karlach: My heart isn't a toy, got it? Treat it like one and you're going to get burned. Badly.

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: f7bb6532-8312-333a-5c9e-17bcbef0fbd9Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: h5489f105g7de8g4f62g8811g132445d48b3eText UUID: 3195a572-a267-4926-8bac-4b2a850b7ec8Group ID: b1860380-8b58-c376-3640-87cd90876096Group Index: 1
            • •
              483.Origin_Intro_Karlach: I'd ask you to explain yourself, but it's clear you have no idea what you want. I hope you figure it out before anyone else gets hurt. [End]

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: caffb29f-7a7d-92f1-be17-6e6dbcb44403Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: h59751669g6f23g44e7gacc7g0b9795da7b9cText UUID: 2d046db2-8d10-42a9-9c85-21931f49d657End Node: TrueGroup ID: b1860380-8b58-c376-3640-87cd90876096Group Index: 2
      • +
        16.Player: I didn't want you to find out like that. I'm sorry.

                  32.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Gods, what is this?! What's this feeling? I thought I knew every type of hurt there was. I didn't know anything, did I?

                  Metadata

                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 0dea62c9-03c2-0c90-26a9-42885b4ae8aeSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: hbb3f6338g0be5g458agae5cgb9b14c4b7241Text UUID: 9882bbae-a1cb-4827-ad84-33ea40099d21Group ID: 49bf6265-2f08-1baf-090d-59530f3ce9a9Group Index: 1
                  • •
                    444.Origin_Intro_Karlach: You should go. I'll get through this. But it's going to hurt. And the worst part is - is I need to do it alone. [End]

                    Metadata

                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: bb14e39e-523c-4afe-6baf-5b0b3ede6964Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: hba0879cegb592g41f9g993ag427dae99a02eText UUID: 51bc0950-130e-4f44-a24d-55946458b849End Node: TrueGroup ID: 49bf6265-2f08-1baf-090d-59530f3ce9a9Group Index: 2
            • +
              244.Player: You were too much for me, Karlach. Too intense. I thought I could handle it, but I was wrong.

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 693f513d-95a4-bf1a-b3e5-94ed9c2f5bdfSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h374f7d2egfeedg40d4gab31gc0842758e6bbText UUID: 1aa8823c-af73-49ea-813e-f8f2aab47fd7Show Once: TrueApproval Rating: 46bc2b39-693a-4889-9d4c-beed3ef26419
              • +

                  27.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Your fun?! You had your fucking fun?! Gods, have I been wrong about you. I don't know if I've ever been more wrong about anything in my life. And that's saying something.

                  Text

          396.Player: Hang the future. I'll take whatever of you I can get.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: a7c9d87f-6d52-71bd-e989-5dc268035b7cSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h3c109399g9e33g49c2gadafg63c99305830cText UUID: ac1247f7-4d47-4f82-bf66-559db16b6cf2Show Once: True
          • •
            65.Origin_Intro_Karlach: All of it. All of me. If I can have you back. I've got a place for you here. Cosy. Warm. Safe. And you can stay as long as you want. [End]

            Metadata

          25.Player: I admit, I've had my doubts. But all paths led me back to you.

          • See Node 65 (Origin_Intro_Karlach) All of it. All of me. If I can have you back. I've got a place for you here. Cosy. Warm. Safe. And you can stay as long as you want.

            420.Origin_Intro_Karlach: In that case, we're a match made in... Faerûn.

              252.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Let's ask questions, then. How long can a moment last? Are we as happy as two people can be?

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 6f1bbe82-b086-8c2e-151b-e02a8af77ac5Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: h29aa3162gc067g48fag8d05gbb155f89017fText UUID: f4763866-13e1-45e1-b8c8-b3c3e5765076Group ID: b2c6b8b1-9597-1743-4662-88ef9478c67aGroup Index: 1
              • •
                344.Origin_Intro_Karlach: We can spend the rest of our lives looking for answers - but who cares if we find them? [End]

                Metadata

                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 95b966e9-923d-c040-6455-517b73c72ab2Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: hbafb5749g1659g4aa0g88d9g169ebcf69b47Text UUID: 8a56717a-0b24-461e-b2a1-893665c0a830End Node: TrueGroup ID: b2c6b8b1-9597-1743-4662-88ef9478c67aGroup Index: 2
        • +
          374.Player: My future's no more certain than your own. But when I dare to imagine having one, it's always you I see beside me.Gale

          Flags and Tags

          checktype Tag | speaker 1 Player
          • Gale {9b0354c0-56d9-4723-8034-918ac9abab19} = True

            579.Origin_Intro_Karlach: I'm seeing you at a desk. Pile of books up to the ceiling. And me barging in with a brace of rabbits for supper.

              604.Origin_Intro_Karlach: You start chopping carrots. I stoke the fire. And every night is the best night we've ever had. [End]

              Metadata

        • +
          177.Player: You were the only suitor worthy of my favour. It was a simple choice.Lae'zel

          Flags and Tags

          checktype Tag | speaker 1 Player
          • Lae'zel {b5682d1d-c395-489c-9675-1f9b0c328ea5} = True

            350.Origin_Intro_Karlach: I don't take that lightly, Lae'zel of Crèche K'liir. Your esteem - your... your everything - means so much to me. I know it isn't lightly given.

          77.Player: Our destinies have long been entwined. Together, we'll find our happy ending.Wyll

          Flags and Tags

          checktype Tag | speaker 1 Player
          • Wyll {5f40def5-d3ec-4698-a367-01a339888956} = True

            377.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Wyll... sometimes I look at you, and I just don't have words for this feeling. You are everything I ever hoped for. Everything I thought I could never have. Never deserve.

              263.Origin_Intro_Karlach: If life decides my fate is a happy ending with you... it will all have been worth it. Everything. [End]

              Metadata

            • •
              416.Origin_Intro_Karlach: I want to hear it all, Astarion. Every part of you - even the things you think I might not like. I can handle wicked. I can handle you. [End]

              Metadata

              128.Origin_Intro_Karlach: I know I can make you melt. And I know you can touch me without getting burned. Oh, the possibilities. [End]

            106.Origin_Intro_Karlach: You've taught me so much. So much about how much a person can hold. When I look at you, it's like I'm staring at a puzzle I'll never solve. But one I want to spend my life enjoying.

            Text

            You've taught me so much. So much about how much a person can hold. When I look at you, it's like I'm staring at a puzzle I'll never solve. But one I want to spend my life enjoying.

      231.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Hope Astarion wasn't too broken-hearted. Though I'm delighted to learn he's got a heart in the first place.

      Metadata

    202.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Hey, soldier.ORI_State_DatingKarlach

    Flags and Tags

    checktype Object | speaker 1 Player
    • ORI_State_DatingKarlach {f24c3f3e-7287-4908-84bf-ba314921f5ee} = True

    Text

    Hey, soldier.
    h907da8fag3197g446bg9721g35676f432d8c | a8f31c6c-c3e8-4a62-b8e0-4e87744af07d | stub
    Uh huh?

    454.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Soldier?

    Text

    Soldier?
    h3025b92ag9c55g47aag9010g63637f4b340e | d4b89670-dff5-271c-44fd-d992b45595ab | stub
    Why're we slowing down?
    h9cd120abgf38bg4541g9f6cg699f546b62f8 | 87cfa74b-ed0d-4628-952c-6bc6b5c81c82 | stub
    Hm?
    h1daedf8cg0641g4944g84e3g4f57324c9ce9 | c2ae9748-02f0-4f61-8029-d02ad8242b9e | stub
    What can I do you for?
    h8a95def6gd011g4179g85a4g5b3ced35dd88 | cba3a765-3e22-4005-8a5b-70f3cee3c60c | stub
    Yeah?
    h391bcc8eg91cag4125g910bgd755e0450a14 | f404544d-8636-4dcf-a2d3-b199a3fb8457 | stub
    What's the story?
    h03a1d93fg86afg4b33gbd8ega2d60c8be226 | 25beada8-485b-4377-ba3f-992a7ebf77f7 | stub
    Heya.
    h8fe4537bgc370g4256g91cdg022c9e4c4c18 | bb48d07d-4c69-438f-ac1f-cd9c09d125f8 | stub
    Hey, soldier.
    h98d97111gc2fdg46cag8bf6gdf467ac9ce31 | 54d8c262-3443-47a6-9edb-c11d11cdeac7 | stub

        433.Origin_Intro_Karlach: The Blade of Frontiers? Yeah, he's been on my tail for ages. Thought he'd seen sense by now, though.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: b7d177db-ea61-01c4-3db8-10c6363245eeSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: h7fcab1e2g8716g4a4bgae60g2db9bf5d3f67Text UUID: 80eb1c8f-8b4b-4d12-ae25-c94b6955d671Timeline Phase Index: 233Timeline Dialog Node UUID: b7d177db-ea61-01c4-3db8-10c6363245eeTimeline Phase Duration: 7.21sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Timeline Material 1 Group ID: 09dc23f6-dd8b-4dd3-a037-634a54a453f7Timeline Material 1 Group File: Engine\Public\Engine\Timeline\MaterialGroups\09dc23f6-dd8b-4dd3-a037-634a54a453f7.lsfTimeline Material 1 Material Resource ID: f7f72db3-3734-835c-da31-7d6a3ef459bdTimeline Material 1 Material Resource Name: VFX_Cinematic_CHAR_SSS_Karlach_Fire_01Timeline Material 1 Material VFX File: Public\SharedDev\Assets\Materials\Effects\Cinematic\VFX_Cinematic_CHAR_SSS_Karlach_Fire_01.lsfTimeline Material 2 Group ID: 9a832561-3d40-462c-b5b3-e72de8dda8e5Timeline Material 2 Group File: Engine\Public\Engine\Timeline\MaterialGroups\9a832561-3d40-462c-b5b3-e72de8dda8e5.lsfTimeline Material 2 Material Resource ID: 567453b8-19e1-bb22-ee1f-491d55c9bedcTimeline Material 2 Material VFX File: (not found)Timeline Material 3 Group ID: e4960711-37ae-486b-ae02-494d31469305Timeline Material 3 Group File: Engine\Public\Engine\Timeline\MaterialGroups\e4960711-37ae-486b-ae02-494d31469305.lsfTimeline Material 3 Material Resource ID: 00caa442-cea1-d836-2ccf-828a69c68abfTimeline Material 3 Material Resource Name: VFX_Model_Unlit_Glow_Karlach_MetalParts_01Timeline Material 3 Material VFX File: Public\Shared\Assets\Materials\Effects\Model\VFX_Model_Unlit_Glow_Karlach_MetalParts_01.lsfTimeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [1576.8s-1583.7s] | @ 1576.8s | speaker 0 | Sad (32)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [1576.8s-1583.7s] | @ 1578.57s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [1576.8s-1583.7s] | @ 1581.15s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [1576.8s-1583.7s] | @ 1582.62s | speaker 0 | Pain (2048) | variation 1

          173.Player: His mission is to kill you. I'm going to help him.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 45511099-6669-369d-f13c-a8c2eb5d14e5Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h996677e9g1624g4368g9784g1028967f2c74Text UUID: bdd2ae04-29a5-4902-a4c7-6573602b1d11Show Once: True
          • +
            172.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Wait. No - don't. I'm not what he thinks. I'm not a devil, and I never wanted to serve Zariel.

                  274.Origin_Intro_Karlach: We could've done good things, you and me. But if you want an enemy, you've got one. [End]

                  Metadata

                400.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Wyll's been deceived. It isn't his fault - but if you kill me, you'll never find out why.

                Metadata

                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: acf10bc6-d6d2-b53f-b04a-d0f5e67096e6Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: h0d73c10ege932g4fb7g919eg8dcf59ce904fText UUID: cd731492-751b-4efc-ac97-709b6779afbdTimeline Phase Index: 239Timeline Dialog Node UUID: acf10bc6-d6d2-b53f-b04a-d0f5e67096e6Timeline Phase Duration: 7.55sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Timeline Material 1 Group ID: e4960711-37ae-486b-ae02-494d31469305Timeline Material 1 Group File: Engine\Public\Engine\Timeline\MaterialGroups\e4960711-37ae-486b-ae02-494d31469305.lsfTimeline Material 1 Material Resource ID: 00caa442-cea1-d836-2ccf-828a69c68abfTimeline Material 1 Material Resource Name: VFX_Model_Unlit_Glow_Karlach_MetalParts_01Timeline Material 1 Material VFX File: Public\Shared\Assets\Materials\Effects\Model\VFX_Model_Unlit_Glow_Karlach_MetalParts_01.lsfTimeline Material 2 Group ID: 9a832561-3d40-462c-b5b3-e72de8dda8e5Timeline Material 2 Group File: Engine\Public\Engine\Timeline\MaterialGroups\9a832561-3d40-462c-b5b3-e72de8dda8e5.lsfTimeline Material 2 Material Resource ID: 567453b8-19e1-bb22-ee1f-491d55c9bedcTimeline Material 2 Material VFX File: (not found)Timeline Material 3 Group ID: 09dc23f6-dd8b-4dd3-a037-634a54a453f7Timeline Material 3 Group File: Engine\Public\Engine\Timeline\MaterialGroups\09dc23f6-dd8b-4dd3-a037-634a54a453f7.lsfTimeline Material 3 Material Resource ID: f7f72db3-3734-835c-da31-7d6a3ef459bdTimeline Material 3 Material Resource Name: VFX_Cinematic_CHAR_SSS_Karlach_Fire_01Timeline Material 3 Material VFX File: Public\SharedDev\Assets\Materials\Effects\Cinematic\VFX_Cinematic_CHAR_SSS_Karlach_Fire_01.lsfTimeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [1637.72s-1645.03s] | @ 1637.72s | speaker 0 | Disgust (128)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [1637.72s-1645.03s] | @ 1640.1s | speaker 0 | Sad (32)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [1637.72s-1645.03s] | @ 1642.38s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)

              453.Player: You don't have the air of a devil. Not by any means.

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: bd756586-d81f-d7ce-74c5-3f9e9f9d6587Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h39b5d6ffg6961g4853g9e81g9c917faebd97Text UUID: 0aefcf5a-3e1f-4328-9da5-a8554693a46dShow Once: True
              • +
                333.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Thank you. Nicest thing anyone's ever said to me.

                Metadata

                  424.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Look, I don't know why Wyll's been sent after me. He's a hero, right? Famously so. Heroes don't go around killing normal people.

                  Metadata

                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: b4e2de90-ffd6-3d95-3a69-1ae99e76ed76Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: he062d5d2g2e4cg4fe8g8030g4b6ae8921a8aText UUID: ade612fa-0ee3-48e7-9b0c-8c69e77ee98bGroup ID: 90677c0d-3576-27b2-f877-25d8f2a322f9Group Index: 1
                  • •
                    544.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Believe it or not, that's all I am. A woman from Baldur's Gate who's been away from home too long.

                    Metadata

                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: df8167ca-10e4-34b1-7430-1d9c60f84dd7Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: hbc1ba276ge303g4a3agbd81g191ae892ce36Text UUID: 02adb8be-05c0-44cf-af49-34a9ea8c784eGroup ID: 90677c0d-3576-27b2-f877-25d8f2a322f9Group Index: 2
            • +
              612.Player: I'll withhold judgement for now.

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: fc975eaf-0dea-fc72-a5c1-1720bba34699Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: he54ffc60g1258g47fega52eg0f93b75af713Text UUID: 54ca2988-9fcd-4fe1-8477-4f14ac59045cShow Once: True
              • •
                457.Origin_Intro_Karlach: See that you do. Last thing I want to have to do is fight you - you seem sound. I'm sound too. You'll see. [End]

                Metadata

          118.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Look - it's an honour to be chased by a famed hero. I'm no devil, though. Not by a long shot.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 2d43107f-147f-fc65-6fc7-09c8a960e95bSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: h0dc24883g35b1g4880gb8f8g09513dc30e45Text UUID: bcf6e3a1-15ec-48d8-809b-69fee2e7d1d7Group ID: fc8b9cba-561d-e9b8-f6c1-2d8671295d74Group Index: 1Addressed Speaker: 0

                  351.Narrator: *A great fire roars through you - the fire of the First Hell.*note: Hands to temples, mindmeld is happening

                    162.Narrator: *Her rage and desperation seep into you. She is a victim of the Blood War, not an agent of it.*note: Hands to temples, mindmeld is happening

                      68.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Fuck. I'll never get used to that.note: Said to herself

                      • +
                        153.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Look, whatever else it may be, the tadpole isn't a liar. I never wanted to serve Zariel, and I escaped the first chance I could. So stand down.note: Gears herself up for battle

                                            284.Player: Let's start at allies and work from there.

                                            Metadata

                                            Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 7ad15dc6-9d1e-07fb-f40a-8ab9ae2ca998Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h745acc09g6adfg4a49g8b1cgceffb32208eeText UUID: 9641ba1c-554e-4c36-a43c-a9f5cba88eb7Show Once: True

                                              298.Origin_Intro_Karlach: I can live with that. Besides, I enjoy winning hard cases over. [End]

                                          • +
                                            46.Player: I don't need more friends.

                                            Metadata

                                            Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 140e54ae-ad80-daed-1cf4-6a9ed93436bdSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h0cec2d1agd0c0g4bd8ga94agf5a25d2860a8Text UUID: 6df95cec-c011-426a-85a5-95f1918619faShow Once: True
                                            • •
                                              205.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Touchy, touchy. But hey, I spent a decade in Avernus surrounded by imps and devils. Winning you over will be child's play. [End]

                                    89.Origin_Intro_Karlach: I swear to you, on all I am, I'm not what you think.

                                    Metadata

                                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 1eb77f5c-f6f9-67f3-39c7-067991840f4bSpeaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: hb5083007g1e9ag49c0gad7cg57543a65dc16Text UUID: 1ba62665-f5cb-41f4-b1ac-834e9dbf3782Group ID: f47783bc-049c-de20-cc7a-49ef49d92cc7Group Index: 1
                                    • See Node 236 (Narrator) *Two souls hang in the balance. Kill Karlach, fulfil your contract - and condemn a possible innocent to the Hells. Or spare her and face the repercussions with Mizora.*

              320.Origin_Intro_Karlach: What are the odds we'd meet someone like him just when we needed him most?

        194.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Hmm. Sad. I couldn't let myself feel sad in the Hells - letting my guard down would've been a death sentence.

          548.Origin_Intro_Karlach: And letting, say, a cambion near me would've been disastrous. I thought it best to just... keep my distance.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: e028c6c7-c580-fce1-a909-3aad07624d45Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: hcb764a29g8539g4c4cg8b99g12ebde822873Text UUID: 0fef9161-9ec8-47c2-9bb6-69dcc34d33c2Group ID: 4ff6ecbd-d459-1474-9bf6-17f62cfbc481Group Index: 1
          • •
            522.Origin_Intro_Karlach: But loneliness that deep gets into the marrow. Now that I'm here - among friends - I can feel it burning out of me. Little by little, step by step.

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: d6085585-8371-d465-ca99-d0fb37a59370Speaker: 0 (Origin_Intro_Karlach)Text Handle: hbed5dac1gf893g44a1g9829g1cf781b9f31eText UUID: 3f286b1c-3f31-4a22-b349-2cc54abef7deGroup ID: 4ff6ecbd-d459-1474-9bf6-17f62cfbc481Group Index: 2

              258.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Well I wasn't. Not for a second. But I guess that doesn't mean much, does it.

              Metadata

        358.Origin_Intro_Karlach: You know I'm up for anything, but there's no room for me! C'mon, put me in already! [End]GEN_MaxPlayerCountReachedGLO_Tutorials_FullPartyRejection

        Flags and Tags

        checktype Global
        • GEN_MaxPlayerCountReached {823b5064-8aa4-c0b7-1b8c-657b46987ccd} = True
        settype Global
        • GLO_Tutorials_FullPartyRejection {94a40e88-0e15-33f5-0beb-0332de542341} = True

        Text

        You know I'm up for anything, but there's no room for me! C'mon, put me in already!
        h4d0f66e0g8218g44dag86aag6979f5b82bde | 9c71c0e1-a59a-e293-bd74-04c00aca79da | stub
        Make room then! And hurry!
        h94ea9ee7g7fe6g4482g8f78g3394efa574d0 | 56e82a13-8f33-4e65-8bf4-fa4c0c5bfef7 | stub
        You're gonna have to tell one of the others to scram if you want to make room for me.
        h550b71e7g6da2g47ccg9ee2gacdbb2c78d55 | e33d5552-6c4e-49c3-acf8-66e0ecabf00f | stub
